creator: ryangard@gmail.com
text:
The volume of installed sounds are reduced to 20% of the original volume, which makes the sounds generated absolutely unusable as they're unable to be heard over the telephone.

Fix: 

Remove -v 0.2 from the string passed to sox
How-To-Repeat: Installation of the port audio/freeswitch-sounds; When installed, the command 'sox' is issued with -v 0.2, which reduces the sound level of the files to 20% of the original volume.
